rationale: Romania's situation mirrors Poland's this cycle — Iran deal momentum offers indirect energy relief, war on the border continues without escalation, no other relevant headlines.

top_events.title: Iran signals Hormuz reopening tied to deal
top_events.summary: Potential deal could lower European energy prices, benefiting Romania's cost-of-living pressures. No signed agreement yet — continuation of prior signal.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war / Black Sea security
top_events.summary: War near Romania's border continues without new escalation or breakthrough this cycle. Background threat remains stable.

top_events.title: Lebanon war victims among 117M displaced worldwide
top_events.summary: Global displacement figures include conflict near Romania's region of interest; no direct impact on Romania but migration pressure context remains elevated.
